title: README present and materially current
Manifests/build files/runtime entrypoints identified
Maintainer/owner/operational responsibility identifiable
External services, deploy targets, and sensitive touchpoints inventoried
Primary build/lint commands run successfully
Formatting/style enforcement present and passing
Major complexity/duplication hotspots identified and bounded
Dead code, stale TODOs, and abandoned paths reviewed
Module boundaries/cohesion are understandable and non-chaotic
SAST executed for all applicable languages
No critical injection/deserialization/RCE-class patterns
Authn/authz checks exist where privileged actions exist
Input validation and output encoding are adequate
Crypto/session/secret handling uses safe APIs and patterns
Security-relevant warnings are triaged or justified
Dependency inventory generated successfully
No unresolved critical dependency vulnerabilities
No unresolved high dependency vulnerabilities without exception
Lockfiles/version pins are present and valid where expected
Stale/EOL dependencies identified
Update path exists: Dependabot/Renovate/manual cadence documented
Third-party licenses inventoried
No prohibited or policy-conflicting licenses
Attribution/license-file obligations satisfied
Unknown or ambiguous licenses triaged
Secrets scan executed against repo contents
No active hardcoded secrets, tokens, credentials, or keys
Examples/config templates do not expose live secrets
Secret storage and rotation path documented
Config/IaC artifacts identified
IaC/config scan executed where applicable
No critical misconfigurations in infra/config
Least-privilege/network/TLS/resource controls are set or explicitly N/A
Required environment variables and secrets are documented
Container assets scanned where applicable
Base images are current, minimal, and pinned
Containers do not run as root without formal exception
Container hardening is present or gap explicitly recorded
Runtime entrypoints and privilege model reviewed
Crash/data-loss/error paths identified
Timeouts/retries/resource boundaries are reasonable
Dangerous debug/dev modes are not enabled by default
Performance-sensitive paths identified
Benchmarks/load tests/profiling exist or gap is recorded
No obvious pathological loops/N+1/unbounded work
Scaling, memory, CPU, and I/O risks documented
Structured logging/error reporting is present where appropriate
Logs do not expose secrets or sensitive data
Failure diagnostics are actionable
Metrics/tracing hooks exist or explicit absence is recorded
Test suite executes successfully where present
Unit coverage exists for critical logic
Integration/e2e coverage exists where architecture requires it
Regression/security edge cases are tested or gap is logged
Coverage/reporting captured or explicitly unavailable
CI configuration exists for active repo or explicit N/A recorded
CI runs build/lint/test
CI runs security/dependency/secret scans or explicit gap recorded
CI secrets handled securely
Branch protection/checks/release gating documented
Deployment scripts/manifests/path reviewed
Safe rollout/rollback support exists or gap is recorded
Production and development settings are separated
Exposed services/endpoints/auth surfaces inventoried
Critical state/data and recovery surface identified
Backup/restore strategy documented or explicit gap recorded
Disaster-recovery/manual recovery steps documented or explicit gap recorded
Health/readiness/liveness/heartbeat checks exist where applicable
Alerting/monitoring ownership and thresholds documented or explicit gap recorded
Data classes handled by repo are identified
Encryption requirements in transit/at rest are satisfied or gap recorded
Retention/deletion/privacy obligations documented where applicable

SBOM generated or explicit gap recorded
Provenance/pinning for dependencies and artifacts verified
